---
title: "Build NGEN Hydrofabric"
date: "2026-04-08"
params:
  flowpath_gpkg: "..."
  flowline_gpkg: "..."
  out_nextgen: "..."
---

```{r}
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(hfngen)
```

## Build the NextGen HydroFabric

```{r}
build_nextgen(params$flowpath_gpkg,
              flowline_gpkg = params$flowline_gpkg,
              outfile = params$out_nextgen)


```


## Add missing fields to the Divides layer

```{r}

# select flowpath_lengthkm and tot_drainage_areasqkm from the network layer.
network_atts <- st_read(params$out_nextgen, layer = "network") |>
  select(divide_id, lengthkm = flowpath_lengthkm, tot_drainage_areasqkm) |>
  distinct()

# Add these attributes to the divides layer
divides <- st_read(params$out_nextgen, layer = "divides") |>
  left_join(network_atts, by = "divide_id")

st_write(divides, params$out_nextgen, layer = "divides", delete_layer = TRUE)
```
